flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Patrick & Henry Community College are 16% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($33.3k vs $39.8k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Patrick & Henry Community College rose 26% between 2006 and 2009 (18.8% → 23.6%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Patrick & Henry Community College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (54.6% → 62.4%).
